title: CYBER WARS: NEON OVERDRIVE
concept: A high-octane narrative depicting a digital duel between hackers' avatars in a futuristic metropolis, where data streams manifest as physical weapons.

images: A futuristic cyber city at night with towering skyscrapers, neon blue and magenta lighting, rain slicked streets, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution.
A high-tech digital warrior made of glowing data streams, wielding a light blade, standing on a rooftop, cybernetic aesthetic.
An intense explosion of digital pixels and binary code in a dark alleyway, glowing particles flying everywhere, high contrast.
Close up of a hacker's eye reflecting a scrolling matrix of green and blue code, futuristic visor, hyper-detailed.
A panoramic view of a neon city skyline with a massive holographic billboard displaying 'SYSTEM CRITICAL', dark clouds, futuristic atmosphere.
asset_prompts.description: Cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy emphasis on high-contrast neon lighting, digital artifacts, and sharp geometric shapes.
asset_prompts.music: High-energy synthwave with aggressive basslines and fast-paced electronic beats.
asset_prompts.sfx: Electronic glitch noises, digital sword clashing, futuristic system alerts, and deep bass drops.
